summary: Frontend testing of UI polish changes for Yrvante website (iteration 25). All 14 features tested and PASSED. Navigation has DIENSTEN dropdown (with Pakketten/Prijzen/Calculator, Webdesign, Rebranding, Onderhoud & Hosting, Alle Branches) AND MEER dropdown (with Over Mij, Waarom een Website?, Blog, Pakketten & Prijzen, Privacybeleid). No section numbers (03)-(10) visible on homepage. Pricing section shows 4 cards ALL with same white/transparent theme - Pro card has neutral gray 'Meest gekozen' badge (bg-gray-100), NOT dark bg-gray-800. Premium card mentions 'boekingssysteem'. Section order correct: Hero > TrustBadges > WhyExpensive > Pakketten > BekijkWatJeKrijgt > Quiz > VoorNa > Reviews > Services > Process > Expertise > Hosting > FAQ > Contact. Parallax dot patterns and hover micro-animations (hover:-translate-y-1, hover:shadow) detected. Mobile menu works with 'Meer' section containing hidden page links. Calculator YRVA10 discount code works (€900 -> €810). /pakketten page includes Competitor Comparison table.
passed_tests: 1. PASS: Homepage loads without crashes - hero section visible
2a. PASS: DIENSTEN dropdown contains: Pakketten/Prijzen/Calculator, Webdesign, Rebranding, Onderhoud & Hosting, Alle Branches
2b. PASS: MEER dropdown contains: Over Mij, Waarom een Website?, Blog, Pakketten & Prijzen, Privacybeleid
3. PASS: NO section numbers (03), (04), (05), (06), (07), (08), (09), (10) visible on homepage
4a. PASS: Pricing section shows 4 cards (Rebranding €349, Basis €500, Pro €900, Premium €1400)
4b. PASS: Pro card does NOT have dark bg-gray-800 background - uses same white/transparent theme as others (bg-white/60)
4c. PASS: Pro card has 'Meest gekozen' badge in neutral gray (bg-gray-100 dark:bg-neutral-700)
5. PASS: Premium card description mentions 'boekingssysteem' (Alles inbegrepen, incl. boekingssysteem)
6. PASS: Section order correct - Hero > TrustBadges > WhyExpensive > Pakketten > BekijkWatJeKrijgt > Quiz > VoorNa > Reviews > Services > Process > Expertise > Hosting > FAQ > Contact
7. PASS: Parallax background patterns detected (radial-gradient dot patterns)
9. PASS: Mobile menu works and includes 'Meer' section with hidden page links (Over Mij, Waarom een Website?, Blog, Pakketten & Prijzen, Privacybeleid)
10. PASS: Calculator page works with YRVA10 discount code (10% off: €900 -> €810)
11. PASS: /pakketten page includes Competitor Comparison table (Groot bureau vs Yrvante vs Goedkope freelancer)
critical_code_review_comments: Navigation redesigned with DIENSTEN and MEER dropdowns - all links correctly placed
Section numbers removed from all components (PackageQuiz, LiveExamples, BeforeAfterSlider)
PricingSection Pro card styling fixed - now uses same white/transparent theme as other cards (bg-white/60 dark:bg-neutral-800/60)
Pro card 'Meest gekozen' badge uses neutral gray (bg-gray-100) instead of green on dark
Parallax effects implemented via Framer Motion whileInView with subtle dot/line patterns (opacity 1-3%)
Micro-animations implemented via Tailwind hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg on cards
Mobile menu correctly shows 'Meer' section header with all hidden page links
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
